theme.label: Theme
theme.rememberForNextLogin: Use as default when I sign in again

dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: KPIs use the reporting period above (default: current month).
dashboard.chartPlaceholder: Income vs expenses and growth charts will use Recharts with live data.

patients.title: Patients
patients.subtitle: Tenant-scoped directory; cross-branch access follows consent rules.
patients.nationalIdDocumentHint: PDF or image, max 15 MB. Stored securely on the server.
patients.noColMatch: No rows match the column filters.
patients.noEncounters: No encounters yet for this patient.
patients.deleteConfirmBody: Delete {{name}} ({{mrn}})? They will be removed from the registry.
patients.clinicalLabsHint: Lab reports from registration and encounters.
patients.clinicalRadiologyHint: Imaging reports from registration and encounters.
patients.documentsOptionalHint: Optional — attach files with a description for each.
patients.captureMultipleHint: Take one or more photos for this document. Tap Done when finished.
patients.cameraUnavailable: Camera is not available in this browser.
patients.cameraPermissionDenied: Could not access the camera. Check permissions and try again.
patients.errorDocDescriptionRequired: Each attached document needs a description.
patients.errorDocCategoryRequired: Each attached document needs a type.
patients.errorDocOtherRequired: Explain what the document is when you choose Other.
patients.errorDocFileRequired: Choose a file for each document description.
patients.errorOtherChannelRequired: Describe how the patient found the clinic.
patients.errorPhoneInUse: Another patient already uses this phone number: {{name}} ({{mrn}}).

encounters.title: Encounter
encounters.subtitle: SOAP notes, vitals, diagnoses — draft → finalize workflow.
encounters.listSubtitle: Open a visit to edit SOAP, vitals, and ICD-10 diagnoses.
encounters.confirmFinalizeBody: Once finalized, SOAP notes, vitals, medications, and documents can no longer be edited. This action cannot be undone.
encounters.finalizeHint: Only the assigned doctor can finalize. Add medications, upload a prescription, or mark “no medications prescribed”.
encounters.medsHint: Add medications manually, upload a prescription, or both. Toggle “no medications” only if none were prescribed.
encounters.noMedsTabHint: No medications were prescribed for this visit. Switch to Manual or Prescription tabs to add entries.
encounters.panelDisabledNoMeds: Turn off “no medications” to add entries.
encounters.confirmNoMedsBody: Any medications you added and any uploaded prescriptions will be permanently removed from this encounter.
encounters.prescriptionUploadHint: Upload a scanned or digital prescription (PDF or image).
encounters.noMedsCheck: No medications prescribed for this visit
encounters.generatePrescriptionHint: Creates a printable prescription image from the medications listed above.
encounters.printBlocked: Allow pop-ups to print the prescription.
encounters.noPatientsRegistered: Register a patient before creating encounters.
encounters.selectPatientHint: Search by English name, Arabic name, or MRN, then choose a row.
encounters.patientSearchPlaceholder: Type English name, Arabic name, or MRN…
encounters.visitFeeLockedHint: Set when this encounter was created.
encounters.linkedAppointmentHint: Search by patient name, MRN, phone, or national ID. Linking sets the appointment to confirmed until the encounter is finalized (then completed).
encounters.appointmentSearchPlaceholder: Type at least 2 characters or pick a patient first…
encounters.appointmentSearchIdle: Type to search or select a patient to see their bookings.
encounters.attendingPhysicianHint: Required when creating an encounter for someone else.
encounters.errorRequiredFields: Fill in all required fields highlighted below.
encounters.noDoctors: No doctor accounts in this organization.
encounters.pickDoctorIdle: Pick the attending doctor for this encounter.
encounters.listSubtitlePhysician: Encounters where you are the attending physician, across all clinics. The clinic column shows where each visit took place.
encounters.patientSearchIdle: Start typing to show matching patients.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.myEmpty: No appointments assigned to you in this period.
appointments.subtitlePhysician: Appointments where you are the assigned doctor. Use the date range to focus on upcoming visits.
appointments.subtitle: Scheduling: new bookings start as Scheduled. Statuses: Scheduled, Confirmed, Cancelled, Completed.
appointments.readOnlyHint: This appointment is completed and cannot be edited.
appointments.confirmCompleteBody: Completed appointments lock editing. Nothing is saved until you click Save.
appointments.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
appointments.invalidDateRange: Enter valid start and end times.
appointments.statusQuickHint: Choose a status below, then click Save to apply. Marking completed asks for confirmation first.
appointments.statusWithSave: Or choose from the list (same as shortcuts)

clinics.title: Clinics & branches
clinics.subtitle: Parent clinic, sister branches, onboarding fields per PRD.
clinics.detailRegistrationHint: Values entered when the clinic was added.
clinics.assignedDoctorsHint: Physicians linked to this clinic for scheduling and operations.
clinics.assignDoctorHint: Add a physician from your organization to this clinic.

clinicRevenue.subtitle: Posted encounter revenue by clinic for the reporting period.
clinicRevenue.noData: No posted revenue in this range.

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Your account in this organization.
profile.aboutPlaceholder: Tell colleagues about your focus areas and languages — demo placeholder text.
profile.changePasswordHint: Update the password you use to sign in to this account.
profile.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters.
profile.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.

doctorRevenue.subtitle: Revenue from completed encounters and other ledger rows tied to you (not appointments). Use the reporting period bar above to change dates; demo data spans the current and prior two months after a fresh seed.
doctorRevenue.linesHint: Only entries linked to encounters where you are the attending doctor.
doctorRevenue.linesClinicHint: The clinic column shows where each visit took place.
doctorRevenue.empty: No revenue lines in this period.

operations.title: Operations
operations.subtitle: Schedule and track surgical procedures.
operations.doctorHint: Doctors assigned to the selected clinic. Type a name to filter.
operations.doctorSearchIdle: Type a name or pick from the list.
operations.confirmCompleteBody: Collect any remaining balance below. The full operation cost is posted to revenue only when you mark it complete.
operations.confirmCompleteRevenueNote: On completion, {{amount}} AED will be added to clinic revenue.
operations.collectRemainingHint: Enter the full remaining amount to continue.
operations.errorPrescriptionRequired: Upload a prescription or generate one from manual medications.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Salaries, materials, utilities, other — with approvals and attachments.
expenses.paymentProofHint: PDF or image, max 15 MB. Attached as support for this payment.
expenses.noLedgerMatch: No rows match the column filters.

revenue.title: Revenue
revenue.subtitle: Recognition by category: visits, procedures, materials, and more.
revenue.operationPaymentHint: Payment updates the operation balance. Revenue is posted when the operation is marked complete.
revenue.searchLedgerHint: Pick a date range, then either all clinics in this organization or one clinic. Totals and the table follow this filter.
revenue.noBreakdownRows: No posted revenue in this range.

hr.title: HR
hr.subtitle: Employees, attendance, leave, payroll inputs, license expiry alerts.
hr.name: Name
hr.attendanceIntro: Record new attendance and review history by employee and date.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Financial, operational, HR, and compliance exports.
reports.growthExplorerHintLive: Monthly series from finalized encounters, posted revenue, and patient registrations in your organization.
reports.acquisitionHint: Registration acquisition channels for new patients in the selected date range ({{from}} → {{to}}).
reports.acquisitionEmpty: No patient registrations with acquisition data in this period.

platform.title: Platform administration
platform.subtitle: Create organizations, clinics, and users. This account has no organization membership.
platform.createOrgHint: Provision a new organization with its group administrator sign-in. Optionally add the first HQ clinic in the same step.
platform.groupAdminHint: Email and password the organization owner will use to sign in and manage their clinics.
platform.createInitialHqOptional: Optionally add a first clinic (leave unchecked to skip)
platform.createInitialHqHint: Fill all required clinic fields to provision a clinic now, or leave them blank and add clinics later from the Clinics tab.
platform.partialClinicBlocked: Complete all required clinic fields or clear them — a partial clinic cannot be saved.
platform.groupAdminPasswordMin: Group admin password must be at least 8 characters.
platform.createOrgValidationTitle: Complete the form to create the organization
platform.errorGroupAdminName: Group admin display name is required.
platform.orgSettingsValidationTitle: Fix the form before saving organization settings
platform.orgNameArOptionalHint: Optional for existing organizations until an Arabic name is set.
platform.orgTableHint: Click a row to open organization details and edit settings.
platform.orgDetailsHint: Update settings, manage clinics, and provision users for this organization.
platform.noUsersYet: No users yet — create a group admin when provisioning the org, or add users below.
platform.noClinicsYet: No clinics yet — add a parent clinic below.
platform.assignClinicsHint: Required for clinic admin and branch manager roles.
platform.featureFlagsHint: Toggle platform-wide feature flags for all organizations.

tabs.usersListHint: Every organization user with assigned clinics. Click a row to edit credentials and role.
tabs.clinicsListHint: Every clinic and branch across organizations. Click a row to edit registration details.
tabs.pickOrgFirst: Select an organization first to assign clinics.

platform.leaveBlankPassword: Leave blank to keep current password
platform.confirmRevealPassword: Stored passwords are encrypted and cannot be viewed. Confirm to set a new password for this user.
platform.passwordNotRetrievable: The current password cannot be displayed. You can set a new one below.

orgHierarchy.title: Organization map
orgHierarchy.platformHint: All organizations with clinics, branches, and assigned users. Expand nodes to explore the breakdown.
orgHierarchy.orgHint: Your organization: parent (HQ) clinics, their branches, and staff assigned to each location.

admin.title: Administration
admin.subtitle: Tenants, users, roles, feature flags — Group Admin surface.
admin.name: Name
admin.orgPatientsHint: Register, update, and remove patient records across your organization.
admin.orgPatientsSearchPh: MRN, name, phone, or national ID…
admin.orgPatientsDeleteConfirm: Delete this patient? They will be removed from the registry.
admin.orgPatientsSelectAllPrompt: All {{count}} patients on this page are selected.
admin.orgPatientsAllMatchingSelected: All {{count}} patients matching this search are selected.
admin.orgPatientsBulkDeleteAllConfirm: Delete all {{count}} patients matching this search?
admin.governanceSubtitle: Searchable audit trail of actions in your scope.
admin.governanceSubtitleOrg: Searchable audit trail of every user action in your organization, including your own admin activity.
admin.auditSearchPh: Action, resource, user name, or email…
admin.clinicAdminScopesHint: Select at least one clinic when role is Clinic administrator.
admin.assignedClinicsRequiredHint: Select at least one clinic for clinic administrator or branch manager.
admin.assignedClinicsOptionalHint: Optional — assign the clinic or branch this user primarily works at.
admin.auditEmpty: No audit rows match your filters.
admin.orgUsersHint: Manage login accounts, roles, and clinic assignments for your organization.
admin.orgUsersDeleteConfirm: Delete this user? This cannot be undone.
admin.orgUsersSelectAllPrompt: All {{count}} users on this page are selected.
admin.orgUsersAllMatchingSelected: All {{count}} users matching this search are selected.
admin.orgUsersBulkDeleteAllConfirm: Delete all {{count}} users matching this search?
admin.orgUsersBulkDeletePartial:
Deleted {{deleted}} user(s). {{failed}} could not be deleted:
{{details}}
admin.orgUsersLegacyApi: Read-only list — full user management will be available after the API deploy completes.
admin.orgUsersLegacyApiEmpty: Only {{count}} users found — the API deploy is still rolling out or demo seed has not finished. Refresh in a few minutes after the GitHub Deploy workflow succeeds.
admin.rbacHint: Example: NURSE cannot access Revenue; PHYSICIAN and FINANCE_OFFICER can.
admin.errorClinicParent: Select the parent clinic for this branch.
admin.clinicPlacementStandaloneHint: Same level as other root clinics in the organization (flat layout).
admin.clinicPlacementBranchHint: Attach under a root-level clinic as a child location.
admin.clinicHasBranchesHint: {{count}} branch(es) use this clinic as parent.
admin.clinicCannotBecomeBranch: Clinics with branches cannot be converted to a branch. Reassign or remove branches first.
admin.branchManagerSubtitle: Staff onboarding and governance for clinics you manage.
admin.createEmployeeHint: Employment type, salary, and clinic assignment. Optional ID document upload.
admin.dataExplorerDescription: Browse and edit allowlisted database tables for this organization. Changes apply immediately; destructive actions cannot be undone. Passwords are never exposed or set from here.
admin.dataExplorerEditHint: Send only fields to change. id is omitted.
admin.dataExplorerNoId: This row has no id field; cannot edit via API.
admin.dataExplorerExportHint: Choose which entities to include, then download one SQL file. Run Prisma migrations on the target PostgreSQL database before importing with psql.
admin.dataExplorerExportNone: Select at least one entity to export.
admin.navTabsFullRoleHint: Saving with all tabs checked removes the custom override.
admin.navTabsSubtitle: Choose an employee and tick which sections appear in their sidebar. Profile always stays on. Clear override to restore their role defaults.

common.comingSoon: API-backed data coming with the NestJS backend.
